---
name: Request a Feature
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**What is the specific feature you would like?**
A 1 liner that describes the feature you would like to see added to the core product. e.g. "Add ability to list all my notes."

**What would you like to see it do?**
A more detailed break down of how this should behave in the UI and/or API.
e.g. "I would like to have a button or menu option in the UI that lists the notes so I can order them by date or by stock name. In the CLI I would like a command to view notes for all stocks."

**What area of the system does this impact? Optional**
UI/API/CLI
[can be updated by core team member]
